detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CryptoClassic._transfer(address,address,uint256) (CryptoClassic.sol#433-495):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (CryptoClassic.sol#477)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (CryptoClassic.sol#509-521)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (CryptoClassic.sol#483)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (CryptoClassic.sol#559)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (CryptoClassic.sol#493)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (CryptoClassic.sol#653)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (CryptoClassic.sol#633)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (CryptoClassic.sol#635)
	CryptoClassic._rOwned (CryptoClassic.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CryptoClassic._takeTeam(uint256) (CryptoClassic.sol#647-655)
	- CryptoClassic._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (CryptoClassic.sol#629-643)
	- CryptoClassic.balanceOf(address) (CryptoClassic.sol#351-355)
	- CryptoClassic.constructor() (CryptoClassic.sol#301-315)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (CryptoClassic.sol#493)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (CryptoClassic.sol#661)
	CryptoClassic._rTotal (CryptoClassic.sol#251) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CryptoClassic._getCurrentSupply() (CryptoClassic.sol#753-763)
	- CryptoClassic._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (CryptoClassic.sol#659-665)
	- CryptoClassic.constructor() (CryptoClassic.sol#301-315)
	- CryptoClassic.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (CryptoClassic.sol#407-415)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CryptoClassic.openTrading() (CryptoClassic.sol#565-583):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (CryptoClassic.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (CryptoClassic.sol#579)
	CryptoClassic.tradingOpen (CryptoClassic.sol#275) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CryptoClassic.openTrading() (CryptoClassic.sol#565-583)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (CryptoClassic.sol#17)
